creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Misfiled followup to ports/106002, already closed. 

Note to shaun@: in this PR, stas@ wonders why we are adding ipv6 to ports 
that just "work with" ipv6, rather than ports that are core parts of ipv6 
testing/framework/etc.  I think this is a legitimate question; what do 
you think?
